# SecurityInterface Constants

**API Collection**

Constants in the SecurityInterface framework.

## Constants

- **Plug-in View Keys**: Keys for the user dictionary passed to [doc://com.apple.securityinterface/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFAuthorizationPluginView/willActivate(withUser:)].
- **SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange**
- **SFDisplayViewException**: Raised when an error occurs in displaying the authorization dialog.

## Reference

- **SFAuthorizationViewState**: Defines the current state of the authorization view.
- **SFButtonType**: These constants define the button types used by authorization plug-ins.
- **SFViewType**: These constants define the view type requested by the authorization plug-in.
- **SecurityInterface Data Types**: Data types found in the Security Interface framework.
- **SecurityInterface Enumerations**
